tasks.instruction: Complete each sentence with one word. The dashes show you the missing letters.

items.stem: She was so e _ _ _ _ _ _ when she found out about the surprise party.
Tom felt w _ _ _ _ _ _ about the maths test because he didn't study enough.
We were really s _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ when the teacher cancelled the homework.
I always feel n _ _ _ _ _ _ before speaking in front of the whole class.
Dad was very p _ _ _ _ when I won first place in the swimming race.
My sister felt j _ _ _ _ _ _ when her friend got a brand new phone.
